info.title: DKBlytics: a modular API to your DKB banking
info.description: A simple API to track personal banking transactions and balances.

post.description:
Create a new account.

Returns 201 on success.
Returns 409 if an account with the same name already exists.

schema.title: Response Get All Accounts Api Accounts  Get

put.description:
Update an existing account's balance.

- The body `name` must match the path `public_id`.
- Returns 404 if the account does not exist.
- Returns 400 if the names do not match.
- Returns 409 if the IBAN is already taken by another account.

get.description: Retrieve a specific account by public ID.
Return a lightweight series with `date` + `balance` at the chosen granularity.

parameters.name: granularity

schema.description: Bucket size for the returned series (daily/weekly/monthly/fiscal_monthly/yearly).

parameters.description: Bucket size for the returned series (daily/weekly/monthly/fiscal_monthly/yearly).

schema.title: Response Get Balance Series Api Balances Series Get

get.description: Return aggregated deltas ("surplus") for the given range.

parameters.name: granularity

schema.description: Bucket size for the returned surplus buckets (daily/weekly/monthly/fiscal_monthly/yearly).

parameters.description: Bucket size for the returned surplus buckets (daily/weekly/monthly/fiscal_monthly/yearly).

schema.title: Response Get Surplus Series Api Balances Surplus Get

post.description:
Create a transaction.

- Duplicate policy:
  * Allowed: duplicates when SAME (fingerprint, batch_hash)
  * Rejected (409): fingerprint exists with a DIFFERENT batch_hash
- Category is resolved from rules for the response.

get.description: List transactions with pagination, sorting, and filters.

parameters.name: category

schema.description:
Optional category filter.
- Leave empty to list all transactions.
- Pass a category name to filter by that category.
- Pass 'null' to list uncategorized transactions.
schema.title: Category

parameters.description:
Optional category filter.
- Leave empty to list all transactions.
- Pass a category name to filter by that category.
- Pass 'null' to list uncategorized transactions.

get.description:
Summarize transactions **by category nodes** at a given depth within an optional scope.

Examples:
- `scope_name=None, depth=1` ⇒ group by root categories.
- `scope_name="Expenses", depth=1` ⇒ group by direct children of “Expenses”.
- `scope_name="Expenses", depth=2` ⇒ group by grandchildren of “Expenses”.

Notes:
- If a resolved transaction category is shallower than the requested depth within the scope,
  it is grouped under its deepest available ancestor (not dropped).
- You can filter via `account`, `date_from`, `date_to`, and `q`. There is **no** separate “group by account”.

parameters.name: scope_name

schema.description: Parent category name whose subtree is the scope. Omit for global roots.
schema.title: Scope Name

parameters.description: Parent category name whose subtree is the scope. Omit for global roots.

parameters.name: depth

schema.description: Depth within the scope to define the groups. 1 = direct children; 2 = grandchildren; etc.
schema.title: Depth

parameters.description: Depth within the scope to define the groups. 1 = direct children; 2 = grandchildren; etc.

schema.title: Response Summarize Transactions By Category Api Transactions Summary Get

put.description:
Update transaction entity and/or text fields.

This endpoint allows manual correction of generic transaction descriptions
while preserving the original fingerprint for deduplication integrity.
Only the entity and text fields can be modified.

schema.title: Response Get All Categories Api Categories  Get

get.description:
Return a nested category tree.

- No name -> all root categories (no parent) with full subtrees.
- With name -> only that category's direct children (each with its subtree).

parameters.name: name

schema.description: If provided, return only the children (with subtrees) of this category name.
schema.title: Name

parameters.description: If provided, return only the children (with subtrees) of this category name.

schema.title: Response Get Category Tree Api Categories Tree Get

get.description:
Retrieve a category by its name.

Note: If multiple categories share this name under different parents,
the request is considered ambiguous and returns 409.

schema.title: Response Get All Category Rules Api Rules  Get

post.description:
Create a category rule (general or transaction-specific).

Rule hierarchy:
  1) transaction-specific rule (transaction_id match)
  2) exact match on (entity AND text)  
  3) default match on (entity AND text IS NULL)
  
After creating the rule, automatically recalculates matching transactions only.

delete.description:
Delete a category rule by id.

After deleting the rule, recalculates only the transactions that could be
affected by the removed scope.

get.description:
Resolve a category name for a given (entity, text).

Note: This endpoint only resolves general rules (entity/text based).
For transaction-specific rules, use the transaction endpoints directly.

Resolution order:
  1) exact (entity AND text)
  2) default (entity AND text IS NULL)
Returns the category name or null if no match.

schema.title: Response Resolve Rule Api Rules Resolve Get

post.description:
Recalculate categories for a subset of transactions based on current rules.
When no filters are provided this still updates all transactions.

parameters.name: transaction_id

schema.description: Limit recalculation to a specific transaction.
schema.title: Transaction Id

parameters.description: Limit recalculation to a specific transaction.

parameters.name: entity

schema.description: Limit recalculation to transactions matching this entity.
schema.title: Entity

parameters.description: Limit recalculation to transactions matching this entity.

parameters.name: text

schema.description: When entity is provided, further filter by description/text.
schema.title: Text

parameters.description: When entity is provided, further filter by description/text.

post.description:
Connect to the bank API, fetch new transactions, insert them,
and update account balances.

Returns a mapping of account name -> number of inserted transactions for this run.

public_id.title: Public Id
public_id.description: Opaque, stable identifier to reference this account in APIs.

iban_last4.title: Iban Last4
iban_last4.description: Last 4 characters of the IBAN for display; may be null if not available.

Account.title: Account
Account.description: Account as returned by the API (IBAN is not exposed).

holder_name.title: Holder Name
holder_name.description: Account holder's full name as provided by the bank.

iban_plain.title: Iban Plain
iban_plain.description: Raw IBAN. Used server-side only to compute a keyed digest; never returned.

AccountCreate.title: AccountCreate
AccountCreate.description: Payload to create or update an account (IBAN never leaves the API).

date.title: Date
date.description: Representative date for the data point.

balance.title: Balance
balance.description: Closing balance on the given date.

parent_name.title: Parent Name
parent_name.description: Direct parent category's name, if any.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Category as returned by the API.

parent_name.title: Parent Name
parent_name.description: Direct parent category's name; omit for a root category.

CategoryCreate.title: CategoryCreate
CategoryCreate.description: Payload to create a transaction category.

transaction_id.title: Transaction Id
transaction_id.description: Transaction ID for transaction-specific rules; null means general rule.

text.title: Text
text.description: Exact description text to match; null means entity-wide default.

category_name.title: Category Name
category_name.description: Name of the category assigned by this rule.

CategoryRule.title: CategoryRule
CategoryRule.description: Category rule as returned by the API.

transaction_id.title: Transaction Id
transaction_id.description: Transaction ID for transaction-specific rules. When provided, rule applies only to this transaction.

text.title: Text
text.description: Exact description text to match; use null for an entity-wide default.

entity.title: Entity
entity.description: Exact counterparty/entity to match. Required for non-transaction rules.

category_name.title: Category Name
category_name.description: Name of the category to assign when the rule matches.

CategoryRuleCreate.title: CategoryRuleCreate
CategoryRuleCreate.description:
Payload to create a category rule.

Rule hierarchy (implemented in the service):
  1) transaction-specific rule (transaction_id match)
  2) exact match on (entity AND text)
  3) default match on (entity AND text IS NULL)

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Zero-based index of the first item.

date.title: Date
date.description: Representative date for the data point.

delta.title: Delta
delta.description: Net change during the bucket ending on `date`.

SurplusPoint.title: SurplusPoint
SurplusPoint.description: Minimal time-series point for surplus/net change.

account_id.title: Account Id
account_id.description: Account public_id this transaction belongs to.

category.title: Category
category.description: Resolved category name based on rules, if any.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Transaction as returned by the API.

text.title: Text
text.description: Transaction description text from the statement.

entity.title: Entity
entity.description: Counterparty/entity name as extracted from the statement.

account_id.title: Account Id
account_id.description: Account public_id this transaction belongs to.

batch_hash.title: Batch Hash
batch_hash.description: Optional batch identifier. Duplicates are allowed within the same batch; cross-batch duplicate fingerprints are rejected.

key.title: Key
key.description: Grouping key (e.g., category name when grouped by category). None represents 'uncategorized'.

amount_sum.title: Amount Sum
amount_sum.description: Sum of amounts in this group (negative = net outflow, positive = net inflow).

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: All transactions that contributed to this group's amount.

TransactionSummary.title: TransactionSummary
TransactionSummary.description: Aggregate summary for transactions grouped by a key.

entity.title: Entity
entity.description: New counterparty/entity name. Leave null to keep existing value.

text.title: Text
text.description: New transaction description text. Leave null to keep existing value.

TransactionUpdate.title: TransactionUpdate
TransactionUpdate.description: Payload to update transaction entity and/or text fields.
